phases.review: Subagent-driven, 10 tasks (T1-T10), two-stage review each (some trivial config/test tasks controller-verified). T4 hit a genuine BLOCK (target Bernoulli-noise-capped, oracle AUC ~0.66 — independently verified). User chose Option A (targeted safe DGP sharpen): re-tuned ONLY the pure-leaf line_increase_good logit to lean on observable drivers with less noise, RNG call structure unchanged so per-column hashes prove businesses/panel + all other portfolio cols bit-identical; Modules 0-3 stayed green. Added a risk-appetite modeled-PD ceiling so the offered cohort is genuinely lower-risk. Awaiting user review before --no-ff merge. Branch build/line-increase.
